widgets_values:

fully white background

A pure frontal face shot of the character, straight-on view from the front, pure white background, capturing the full face and upper body directly facing the camera.
A view of the character from directly behind, showing the back of the head, pure white background, shoulders, and body with no face visible.
An angular view of the character from the front-left, pure white background, three-quarter angle showing partial face and left side profile.
A side view of the character from the left, profile shot capturing the left silhouette of the face and body, pure white background.
An angular view of the character from the behind-left, three-quarter back angle showing the left rear side and partial back, pure white background.
An angular view of the character from the front-right, three-quarter angle showing partial face and right side profile, pure white background.
A side view of the character from the right, profile shot capturing the right silhouette of the face and body, pure white background.
An angular view of the character from the behind-right, three-quarter back angle showing the right rear side and partial back, pure white background.
A frontal view of the character from a bit above, high angular perspective showing the face and upper body looking slightly downward at the camera, pure white background.
A frontal view of the character from below, low angular perspective showing the face and upper body looking slightly upward at the camera, pure white background.

nodes.title: Benchmark
widgets_values:
| GPU | Vram Usage | Ram & Swap Usage | Time taken to run full workflow |
|--------|---------|------------|---------------------------|
| RTX 4070 Ti Super 16G Linux  | 99%      | 32G & 28G         | ~22 minutes                         |
| RTX 4080 Super 16G Windows | 99%      | Total usage: 70G         | ~22 minutes                         |

The workflow may crash if you have less RAM or SWAP memory. I am trying to make this more efficient and will update the workflow soon if I succeed to do that.

# BEST One-Click Consistent Character Dataset Creator for AI Influencer Workflow

**Sample Generation Result of this workflow:** [View Photos](https://dri.me/KJbcva5r7PZQCiLvpbiq1qRyp7qIMf)
- View all the generated Image along with the reference image to get an idea of how the final result will look like.
- On this example out of 60 Images I got 3 broken images and 57 Images were perfectly fine to use for LoRA training.

**Author:** Coolstrad  
**Version:** Latest (as of February 2026)  
**Purpose:** This workflow simplifies the creation of high-quality, consistent character datasets for AI influencers using ComfyUI. It's designed for ease of use, allowing you to generate organized image sets with minimal input. Perfect for training LoRAs or building AI-generated content pipelines.

## Overview
This is a streamlined, one-click tool for generating consistent character datasets. Upload a reference image, provide a character name, and run the workflow. It handles everything from image generation to organization, outputting results directly into a dedicated folder. 

The workflow supports both SFW and NSFW outputs, making it versatile for various AI influencer projects. It leverages advanced models like Flux, Qwen, and SDXL to ensure high fidelity and consistency.

## Key Features
- **One-Click Simplicity:** No complex setup—just upload, name, and run.
- **Consistent Results:** Maintains character likeness across generated images, with minor variations based on input quality.
- **NSFW Support:** Capable of producing adult-themed datasets automatically.
- **Organized Output:** All images are saved in `ComfyUI/output/datasets/<character_name>` for easy access and management.
- **Performance:** Processing time depends on your hardware; optimized for standard setups.
- **LoRA Compatibility:** Datasets produced are suitable for training LoRAs with acceptable quality.

## Usage Instructions
1. **Install Dependencies:** Ensure ComfyUI is installed and configured.
2. **Download Models:** See the "Required Models" section below and place them in the appropriate directories.
3. **Run the Workflow:**
   - Upload your reference character image.
   - Enter the character's name.
   - Hit "Run" and wait for completion.
4. **Output Location:** Find your dataset in `ComfyUI/output/datasets/<character_name>`.
5. **Tips:** For best results, use high-quality reference images. NSFW results are automatically done.

## Community and Support
Join our growing Discord community for AI influencer workflows, general AI image/video generation tips, exclusive workflows, and direct support.

- **Discord Server:** [Join Here](https://discord.gg/RnUHPzTkXH)  
  A vibrant space for insights, troubleshooting, and collaboration. If you encounter any issues running this workflow, hop in—I'll personally help you out!

## Notes and Limitations
- **Face Consistency:** The workflow excels at maintaining character features, but slight deviations may occur depending on the initial image quality. These are usually subtle and not noticeable in final outputs.
- **LoRA Training:** Datasets generated here produce LoRAs of solid quality—test and iterate as needed.
- **Hardware Requirements:** Works on most setups, but for Qwen models, choose the variant based on your VRAM (e.g., lower-bit versions for limited memory).
- **Ethical Use:** Always respect guidelines for AI-generated content, especially NSFW.

## Required Models
Download and install these models into your ComfyUI directories as specified. Links point to official sources.

### Flux-Related Models
- **Flux Model:** [Download](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/vae-text-encorder-for-flux-klein-4b/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/flux-2-klein-4b.safetensors) `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/`
- **Text Encoder:** [Download](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/vae-text-encorder-for-flux-klein-4b/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors) `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/`
- **VAE:** [Download](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/vae-text-encorder-for-flux-klein-4b/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors) `ComfyUI/models/vae/`

### Qwen-Related Models
- **Qwen (Select based on memory):** [Download Options](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF/tree/main) `ComfyUI/models/unet/`
- **Qwen LoRA:** [Download](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning/resolve/main/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-bf16.safetensors) `ComfyUI/models/loras/`
- **Qwen Text Encoder:** [Download](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors) `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/`
- **Qwen VAE:** [Download](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors) `ComfyUI/models/vae/`

### SDXL Model
- **Recommended SDXL Porn Model (or any compatible SDXL):** [Download](https://civitai.com/models/82543?modelVersionId=2043971) `ComfyUI/models/checkpoints/`

### Ultralytics Models
Download both and place in `ComfyUI/models/ultralytics/bbox/` folder.
- **Female Breast Detection:** [Download](https://huggingface.co/ashllay/YOLO_Models/resolve/e07b01219ff1807e1885015f439d788b038f49bd/bbox/female-breast-v4.0-fantasy.pt)
- **Female Body Detection:** [Download](https://civitai.com/models/1816953?modelVersionId=2056142)

## Credits
